name: Service Interface Changes
description: Middleware context accessor rename + all 8 service interface teamID→int64 changes. Breaking changes that handler and test layers depend on.

gates.description: go build ./... passes; all service interfaces use int64 for external-origin IDs

name: Handler Updates & Test Fixes
description: Mechanical handler call-site updates (GetTeamID→GetTeamBizKey) and test mock/assertion updates to match new signatures.

gates.description: go test -race ./internal/... passes; zero uint(bizKey) casts remain; coverage ≥ 75%
